title: sqlite3LoadExtension truncates file names
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE extensions (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, path VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, version INT DEFAULT 1);
INSERT INTO extensions (name, path) VALUES ('ext2', NULL);
SELECT * FROM extensions WHERE path LIKE 'C:/extensions/%';
UPDATE extensions SET path = 'C:/extensions/ext1_updated.dll' WHERE id = 1;
